prerequisites: An Aviationstack account. Sign up for a free plan at https://aviationstack.com/signup/free, which includes 100 API requests per month.
An Aviationstack API access key, found in your account dashboard at https://aviationstack.com/dashboard. This is supplied to the connector as the access_key field.
A start_date value (the starting date from which the connector retrieves data).

authMethods.name: API access key
authMethods.summary: Aviationstack authenticates with a single API access key. Provide it as the connector's required secret access_key field. Each Aviationstack account is issued one unique access key, available in the account dashboard at https://aviationstack.com/dashboard.

setupSteps.title: Create an Aviationstack account
setupSteps.body: Register at https://aviationstack.com/signup/free. The free plan includes 100 API requests per month.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API access key
setupSteps.body: After signing up, open your Aviationstack account dashboard at https://aviationstack.com/dashboard and copy your unique API access key. This key is used to authenticate every API request.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the copied key into the required access_key field, and set the required start_date field to the date from which you want the connector to begin retrieving data.

sources.title: Sign Up - Aviationstack API (free plan, 100 requests/month)
